Peacebringer  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Blunt Atk Delay: 30
DMG: 28 Dmg Bonus: 120
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WT: 10.0 Size: LARGE
Class: MNK
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
Peacebringer
Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Blunt Atk Delay: 30
DMG: 28 Dmg Bonus: 120
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WT: 10.0 Size: LARGE
Class: MNK
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Type:2H Blunt
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:18 pp 0 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:950

Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-16 11:58:05
Page Updated:Mon May 18th, 2015

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Average Price: No Data Pricing Data...
Rarity: Very Rare
Level to Attain: 55

Since no one has posted on this item in 7 years I'll just confirm that it does still drop from Tolapumj as I got it tonight.

dirt cheap

# Jul 31 2004 at 10:40 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593362610164
Scholar
331 posts
Most monk-only gear on Stromm, such as this and the Adamantite Club, have greatly fallen in price over the last year. While shopping for things to resell I found a Peacebringer for 200pp, though I feel it was more likely a typo than a real price. Two others were up for 2000pp. Either way it's a decent 2hb.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jun 05 2002 at 2:31 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I'm selling this thing on Saryrn and it's a ******* ***** to sell, you wouldn't believe how many times I've heard "lol that is 2 heavy u r gay" or something to that effect. I started at 7000(I was just guessing value), but I've since dropped the price to 4000.
Sale price
QuoteReply
# Dec 26 2001 at 1:06 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592251877399
View User Forum
11 posts
This item has been selling on Tarew Marr for 5k this last week. I guess most people are selling this heavy item to buy a horse. Someone selling it for 17k is a little out of regular price range. GL buddy...lol. Nobody likes a fat monk, btw.

Just updating this since all these posts are old. With PoP and LoY, the price of these has dropped to 1k at most, and can normally find 3-5 for sale at any particular time in the bazaar.
▲ Page top
You Can Be Under Weight With This!!
QuoteReply
# Sep 19 2001 at 6:51 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591756795321
View User Forum
Scholar
177 posts
I have this on Xegony and am still 2 lbs under wt limmit. Yes that is correct with an allowed 18 lbs at level 51 I can weild this and about 70pp in coins (hehe). I love 2HB weapons. I hit in the low 130s with this UNBUFFED and with shammy buffs and Boon on I did a 151 141 combo. How sweet is that! If you want to see this thing in action come visit me in KC as I plan on hunting there till mid 50s.

yeah
QuoteReply
# Sep 16 2001 at 12:06 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592251078355
1 post
this this is hard as hell to sell though

been tryin to sell it for 17 000 on vazealle and havnt had any luck yet
▲ Page top
Damn fools
QuoteReply
# Aug 23 2001 at 7:48 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592757443821
4 posts
Anyone who says this weapons sucks is a damn fool. Mabey its *the* best 2hb in the game but how many are better, 3, mabey 4? And anything better than this is uber rare anyway. 10 weight sucks ill admit that. But its not really as bad as so many of you make it out to be. The guy who said he lost 70 ac for being 4 over weight is full of $hit. At lvl 50 I lost mabey 30 ac for being 4 over weight. Monks are not tanks and we arnt soloing at this lvl who cares about the ac loss? I just bag it in my tink bag if I have to pull an uber mob. Let the tanks get aggro then whip this bad boy out. Im hitting in the high 120's with this max. 70 to 90 being an average hit.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: May 06 2002 at 8:41 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) ...this weapon isn't that good man... there are about 15 2hb that are much better pre-luclin and now there are tons more in akheva... i'd take a primal or priceless 2hb from ST over this any day lol. not to mention Abashi's Rod of Disempowerment. A 40 30 with a TRIGGERED disempower proc? not to mention a ****-load of stats. I've seen a monk with max 70% haste use this (lvl 60 of course) on Brell. The new stats would be 40 9... that rocks and then with the dmg x 4 discipline (i asked him to use), it made it a 160 9 for 12 seconds. now he was hitting from 300 to 550 with a delay of 9... BOOOM
RE: Damn fools
QuoteReply
# Jan 23 2003 at 9:35 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592256459416
20 posts


Edited, Thu Jan 23 21:09:17 2003
▲ Page top
RE: Damn fools
QuoteReply
# Jul 19 2002 at 1:25 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592254462108
23 posts
firstly.. those weaps you said cant even be attained by 95% of the people..
secondly, 70% haste on a 30 delay weapon doesnt bring it down to 9.. its 100/170 which equals .588 and 30x.588=~17 delay..
you obviously have no clue what the hell you're blabbering about..
AND lastly that discipline doesnt work that way.. it means that 160 is the minimum damage you can do, doesnt mean that it turns the weapon into a 160 dam weap.. he'd be hitting like 250 or so max still but no lower than 160.. if however it turned the weap into 160 dam you'd be doing more like 700 damage per hit or more.. you cant even make stuff up correctly.
Peacebringer is basically a Tstaff without the proc (and 1 less damage).. its a lot cheaper, and weight doesnt matter that much, sure 10 weight isnt so friendly.. but its not a horrible weapon..

▲ Page top
Message for Xaruliz Lethalshadow
QuoteReply
# Jun 05 2002 at 2:27 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591752085558
88 posts
Your an idiot, I'm still laughing about your primal/priceless remark, and don't even get me started about Abashi's Rod.
Sorry to be the one to break your bubble, but that **** is RARE. Most level 60s on my server don't even have Sleeper Keys and Abashi's Rod drops off Vulak Aerr, the boss-monster of ToV, you'll never get either of those things, so STFU.

Message for Xaruliz Lethalshadow

# May 24 2001 at 4:18 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Personally, I don't think the weight should be that big of an issue. The dmg you'll do with this more than makes up for the 10 to 15 AC you'll lose, and if you have 100+stamina your attack speed won't decrease. *shrug* My friend traded his *** of for this, and then he let me use it for a week or two. Its great )))


Damonque
35th monk of CT
▲ Page top
RE: Peacebringer
QuoteReply
# Jul 09 2001 at 10:41 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593361209300
17 posts
LOL

You lose a lot more than 10-15 AC for going over your wt limit, and the loss increases as you increase in level (yes, at lower levels, who cares about the wt limit). Last I checked, around level 40 I lost in excess of 70 AC for being a FEW (less than 4) pounds over weight.

I agree tho, in many situations these near 1.0 ratio 2hb weapons are worth using, even if they weigh 10.0 and put you over your wt limit.

Xendax Nor'Ashaan
Level 45 Monk
Veeshan Server
▲ Page top
RE: Peacebringer
QuoteReply
# Jul 11 2001 at 4:56 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1595175359083
31 posts
Actually with 10 slot 100% wt reduce Tinker Bag or 8 this weapon isn't so bad. I can stay 16wt. I am 57 so the weight limit is way above that.
▲ Page top
RE: Peacebringer
QuoteReply
# Mar 06 2002 at 12:07 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361209300
17 posts
You miss the point. You cannot use it as a weapon when it is sitting in your tink bag now can you. If you are going to use it you have to contend with the wt of it. At 52, 2 wt over my limit costs me on the order of 70 AC
▲ Page top
RE: Peacebringer
QuoteReply
# Apr 17 2002 at 6:06 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591752651026
View User Forum
110 posts
no YOU miss the point. when a monk wants to avoid aggro 2hb rocks the house... big dmg but hit less often = maintain good dmg w/o gettin attention of the mob. since you are AVOIDING aggro, who cares about AC? but if u soloing or need aggro for some reason, then throw it in tink bag. =)
